Verified: login, plans endpoint (trial_days=7), maturity dimensions (6 dimensions with 30 questions), save/get diagnosis, AI recommendations with credit deduction, credits balance/history, and unauthorized access protection.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Maturity Diagnosis module fully tested and working. The module includes: 1) GET /api/maturity/dimensions returns 6 dimensions (estrategia, identidade, comunicacao, experiencia, cultura, metricas) with 5 questions each (30 total), 2) POST/GET /api/brands/{id}/maturity-diagnosis for saving/retrieving diagnosis results, 3) POST /api/brands/{id}/maturity-diagnosis/recommendations for AI-powered recommendations (costs 1 credit). All endpoints require authentication. Demo user credentials: demo@labrand.com / password123, brand_id: brand_92bcc15a44fb.
